chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acq. Appln. No. 49 of 2022. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For orders as to Non-Prosecution. 05.05.2025. ************ None has appeared on behalf of the appellant and no intimation has been received. The record reflects that the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal has been pending since 2022. However no progress has been made since then. It appears that the appellant has lost interest in pursuing the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal. Such fact has left this Court with no other option except to dismiss the same for non-prosecution. Order accordingly. J U D G E Manthar Brohi
